noir.name: Noir

findings: wave-1: comp reading warmed 1.040→1.092 HOT after kit-faithful S2 fix (+5 rounds self, instantReload allies) — solo anchor bit-identical; residual comp-side over-model to hand-tune (SG landing is solo-calibrated)

caveats: skill2: Max Ammo +5 rounds is ALL-allies in-kit; modeled self-only as maxAmmoPct 55.56 (engine has no flat per-unit ammo) — teammates' +5 rounds unmodeled (⚑)
burst: Hit Rate ▲ (13.93% SG-allies /10s, 11.61% allies /30s) modeled as hitRatePct — currently inert in the engine; magnitude unmeasured (⚑)
burst: the 11.61%/19.36% block requires a same-squad ally (Blanc) on the battlefield — engine has no squad gate, modeled un-gated (effects inert vs the partless boss) (⚑)
